items.title: Call tree of naïve fib(5) — exponential overlap
items.caption: fib(3) is computed twice, fib(2) three times — the work doubles per level → O(2ⁿ). Memoization collapses the tree to a path → O(n).

items.title: Recursion as an explicit stack
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  R["recursive call f(n-1)"] -.equivalent to.-> P["stack.append(state); loop"]
  Base["base case returns"] -.equivalent to.-> Pop["state = stack.pop()"]
items.caption: Every recursion can be rewritten as a loop with an explicit stack — same Big-O, no recursion-depth limit.
